mapper.sql: id, name_zh, name_ja, name_en, slug, sort_order, created_at, created_by, updated_at, updated_by, deleted, deleted_at, deleted_by
mapper.select: SELECT FROM t_category WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id ASC

SELECT c.id, c.name_zh, c.name_ja, c.name_en, c.slug, c.sort_order, c.created_at, c.created_by, c.updated_at, c.updated_by, c.deleted, c.deleted_at, c.deleted_by, COUNT(a.id) AS article_count FROM t_category c INNER JOIN t_article a ON a.category_id = c.id AND a.deleted = 0 AND a.status IN (2, 4) AND a.publish_at <= #{now} WHERE c.deleted = 0 GROUP BY c.id, c.name_zh, c.name_ja, c.name_en, c.slug, c.sort_order, c.created_at, c.created_by, c.updated_at, c.updated_by, c.deleted, c.deleted_at, c.deleted_by ORDER BY c.sort_order ASC, c.id ASC
SELECT FROM t_category WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT FROM t_category WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0 FOR UPDATE
mapper.update: UPDATE t_category SET name_zh = #{category.nameZh}, name_ja = #{category.nameJa}, name_en = #{category.nameEn}, slug = #{category.slug}, sort_order = #{category.sortOrder}, updated_at = #{updatedAt}, updated_by = #{updatedBy} WHERE id = #{category.id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE t_category SET deleted = 1, deleted_at = #{deletedAt}, deleted_by = #{deletedBy}, updated_at = #{deletedAt}, updated_by = #{deletedBy} WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
